{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura viewing tower
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] stood beneath the [[Akura viewing tower]] after a [[spatial transfer]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Someone broke through security at the back of the [[Akura viewing tower]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
